reference: AND AMONGST THEM WERE SOME WHO WOULD HAVE CHOSEN THE CADET ZAU AL MAKAN FOR QUOTH THEY HIS NAME BE LIGHT OF THE PLACE AND HE HATH A SISTER NUZHAT AL ZAMAN HIGHS THE DELIGHT OF THE TIME BUT THEY SET OUT FIVE YEARS AGO FOR AL HIJAZ AND NONE WOTTETH WHAT IS BECOME OF THEM
text: And amongst them were some who would have chosen the cadet Zawal Makan, For, quoth they, his name be light of the place, And he hath a sister, Nuzhat al-Zaman Haiz, the delight of the time. But they set out five years ago for Al-Hijaz, And none wotteth what is become of them.
